title: secure_zero may not survive LTO or provide memory barrier
description: lichen_util.h:20-26 — volatile pointer trick is not guaranteed by C standard. LTO could remove the loop. Also lacks memory barrier for reordering. Used at lora_l2.c:144-145, ipv6_addr.c:103-104, lichen_l2.c:560,571. Consider Zephyr's memset or explicit_bzero/memset_s.
close_reason: Added compiler memory barrier to prevent LTO removal and reordering
